name: Regulated Change Audit Trail
description: Changes to regulated systems must have a complete audit trail: research action, formal reasoning, user approval, test pass, and commit — all with rationale.
formula: G(GitCommit ∧ regulated_scope → P_chain(ReadFile) ∧ P_chain(Verify ∧ proved) ∧ P(UserApproval) ∧ P(RunTests ∧ completed))
rationale: SOX, HIPAA, and financial regulations require demonstrable evidence that changes were reviewed, tested, and approved. This policy makes the audit trail machine-checkable.

examples.passes: ReadFile → Formalize → Verify(proved) → UserApproval → RunTests(pass) → GitCommit
examples.fails: GitCommit to regulated module without formal verification in the dependency chain
